data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. Let me run just the Integration tests:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with MSTest runner. The `Directory.Build.props` has `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` set to `true`, which means it uses the newer Microsoft.Testing.Platform integration with `dotnet test`.

The tests have `TestCategory` attributes - "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the Integration tests.

With MSTest and the testing platform, I can filter by category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-06e3f4118863436bb7e4618888118403 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests filtered by category
